'''Alurali''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the years prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Unlike most Jedi, Alurali was trained at the experimental [[Almas Academy]] in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]].

==Biography==
Born in the late waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Alurali was discovered by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and entered into their experimental [[Jedi academy|academy]] on the planet [[Almas]] as opposed to the main [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Passing through her early education, Alurali was selected by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] to become a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. Serving and learning from her master, Alurali became good friends with fellow Padawan [[Lora Nadad]]. Together, they set a philanthropic group of Jedi who worked to bring to light the harsh reality that plagued the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]]: some two thousand homeless orphans roamed the streets on several worlds. This group of children, collectively known as "[[The Lost (children)|the Lost]]," had been overlooked for many years but was given more attention through the Jedi's work. Alurali's master suggested that she take the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]], which she passed; the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] acknowledged her success and allowed the [[Almas Council]] to [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|knight]] her.<ref name="TL" />
